leadText: Leftovers (Japanese: たべのこし Leftovers) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It gradually restores the holder's HP over time.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Restores 1/16 of the holder's maximum HP (rounded down, but not less than 1) at the end of each turn. In Generation IV , Leftovers is able to heal the holder regardless of Heal Block . From Generation V onwards, Leftovers cannot heal Pokémon affected by Heal Block. Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Leftovers restores health once every 10 seconds, even outside of battle, as long as the holder is outside its Poké Ball.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Restores HP during battle. (HOLD) R S E Colo XD A hold item that gradually restores HP in battle. FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . The holding Pok é mon gradually regains HP during battle. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder's HP is gradually restored during battle. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder's HP is slowly but steadily restored throughout every battle. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder's HP is slowly but steadily restored throughout a battle. ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It slowly but steadily restores the holder's HP.
